headerTitle: Senior Solutions Engineer  ·  Enterprise ATS Integration  ·  Technical Sales  ·  API Integration Architecture
intro: Indeed’s Solutions Engineering team owns pre-sales technical discovery, scoping, and solution validation that turns a prospect into a signed client. Six FDE engagements built exactly that operating model across eight industries.
bullets: Pre-sales technical discovery and solution scoping — six enterprise cycles: mapped technical environments, identified integration points, scoped solution architecture, presented to operations and executive stakeholders. Technical validation through working implementations, not slide decks.

REST API integration architecture — 100+ endpoints across 13 production systems: auth flows, webhook pipelines, data transformation, and third-party integrations (Stripe, Twilio, Google OAuth2, Sinch, IMAP). Integration depth is production-grade, not theoretical.

Cross-functional stakeholder range — former GM with P&L ownership and 40–80 staff. C-suite business case to API schema in the same conversation. Engineering, Product, and Sales partnership is the operating model across every engagement.
matchNotes: Strong on pre-sales discovery pattern (6x FDE), REST API integration depth, cross-functional stakeholder range (GM background), and PoC delivery. ATS/HR tech domain is new. No formal SE title. $84-175K wide range — upper end requires strong ATS ecosystem knowledge. Technical sales execution pattern is direct match.
